title: Flea Treatment in Jericho, NY | $350-$650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Jericho, Long Island. Effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$650 treatment!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Jericho home or business? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Jericho and Long Island, eliminating fleas at every life stage. Our licensed technicians use safe, proven methods to protect your family and pets from these persistent pests.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Jericho residents for years with fast, reliable flea extermination services. Our experienced team understands the unique challenges of Long Island homes and delivers customized treatment plans with a satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Jericho's tree-lined neighborhoods and proximity to parks like Cantiague Park mean pets and wildlife can easily introduce fleas into homes. From the historic estates near the Jericho-Syosset border to modern residences along Broadway, we protect properties throughout the community with thorough flea treatments.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Jericho range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property and severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and transparent pricing before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as we target all life stages. We often schedule a follow-up treatment to ensure all emerging fleas are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied by our trained professionals. We'll provide specific instructions on any precautions to take during and after treatment, typically recommending a 2-4 hour absence during application.

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your flea treatment services in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We stand behind our flea treatments with a service guarantee. If fleas return within the warranty period, we'll re-treat your property at no additional charge. We also provide guidance on preventing future infestations.
